title: Research
text:
Projects

Methane Plumes — detecting and attributing point sources from space

title: Methane Plumes
text: We develop methods to detect methane enhancements and connect them to likely sources using imagery and atmospheric transport context.

title: Earth Observing Lab
text: Welcome! We build and apply Earth observation methods to understand and reduce greenhouse gas emissions and improve climate decision-making.

title: Earth Observing Lab
text:
What we do

Satellite and airborne retrievals (CO₂ / CH₄ and related tracers)
Inversion and attribution methods
Open-source tools and reproducible workflows
Partnerships with science and mitigation communities
